# dedi
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>quote</title>
  <style>
    

    *, *::before, *::after { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    html, body { width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow: hidden; }

    body {
      font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      position: relative;
    }

    .bg {
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');
      background-size: cover;
      background-position: center top;
      z-index: 0;
    }

    .bg::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, transparent 30%, rgba(0,0,0,0.28) 100%);
    }

    .center-block {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 10;
      text-align: center;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      user-select: none;
    }

    .word {
      font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
      font-weight: 400;
      font-style: normal;
      font-size: clamp(2rem, 6vw, 3.8rem);
      color: #ffffff;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      line-height: 1;
      text-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.55), 0 6px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.40);
      transition: opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease;
    }

    .word.fade-out { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-6px); }
    .word.fade-in  { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

    .lang-label {
      font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
      font-weight: 300;
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.60);
      letter-spacing: 0.22em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      transition: opacity 0.6s ease;
    }

    .lang-label.fade-out { opacity: 0; }
    .lang-label.fade-in  { opacity: 1; }

    .counter {
      position: fixed;
      bottom: 22px;
      left: 22px;
      z-index: 10;
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.10);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
      border-radius: 6px;
      padding: 5px 10px 5px 8px;
      backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
    }

    .counter-eye {
      width: 14px;
      height: 14px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
      opacity: 0.75;
    }

    .counter-num {
      font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
      font-weight: 400;
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.90);
      letter-spacing: 0.06em;
      line-height: 1;
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="bg"></div>

  <div class="center-block">
    <div class="word fade-in" id="word">quote</div>
    <div class="lang-label fade-in" id="lang">english</div>
  </div>

  <div class="counter">
    <svg class="counter-eye" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <path d="M1 12C1 12 5 4 12 4C19 4 23 12 23 12C23 12 19 20 12 20C5 20 1 12 1 12Z" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
      <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.8"/>
    </svg>
    <div class="counter-num" id="counter-num">—</div>
  </div>

  <script>
    const entries = [
      { word: 'quote',     lang: 'english'    },
      { word: 'citation',  lang: 'français'   },
      { word: 'cita',      lang: 'español'    },
      { word: 'Zitat',     lang: 'deutsch'    },
      { word: 'citação',   lang: 'português'  },
      { word: '引用',       lang: '日本語'      },
      { word: '인용',       lang: '한국어'      },
      { word: '引述',       lang: '中文'        },
      { word: 'citazione', lang: 'italiano'   },
      { word: 'citaat',    lang: 'nederlands' },
    ];

    let idx = 0;
    const wordEl = document.getElementById('word');
    const langEl = document.getElementById('lang');

    function rotate() {
      wordEl.classList.remove('fade-in'); wordEl.classList.add('fade-out');
      langEl.classList.remove('fade-in'); langEl.classList.add('fade-out');
      setTimeout(() => {
        idx = (idx + 1) % entries.length;
        wordEl.textContent = entries[idx].word;
        langEl.textContent = entries[idx].lang;
        wordEl.classList.remove('fade-out'); wordEl.classList.add('fade-in');
        langEl.classList.remove('fade-out'); langEl.classList.add('fade-in');
      }, 620);
    }

    setInterval(rotate, 3000);

    const BASE = 243;
    const KEY  = 'quote_views';
    const stored = localStorage.getItem(KEY);
    let views = stored !== null ? parseInt(stored, 10) : BASE;

    if (!sessionStorage.getItem('quote_counted')) {
      views += 1;
      localStorage.setItem(KEY, views);
      sessionStorage.setItem('quote_counted', '1');
    }

    document.getElementById('counter-num').textContent = views.toLocaleString('fr-FR');
  </script>
</body>
</html>
